responsibilities.detail: Developed responsive cloud apps with Angular and C#/.NET.
Managed Azure CI/CD pipelines using Bicep and YAML automation.
Authored optimized SQL and managed Snowflake data warehouses.
Contributed to all SDLC phases, from sprint planning to retrospectives.
Resolved complex Azure cloud issues to improve performance and uptime.
Diagnosed and resolved global Azure cloud environment issues as Tier 2 support.
Leveraged SQL to extract reports and identify critical data inconsistencies.
Reduced manual effort by building Python scripts for routine support tasks.
Managed bug escalations and cross-team collaboration to meet all SLAs.
